tierReasoning: Requesting side of the approved dashboard-streaming spec: WSManager routes a remote-machineId subscribe through a per-peer PeerStreamProxy (phase-1, reused) + a PoolStreamConnector that mints a ticket (phase-2a verb) and opens /pool-stream. Output fans back machine-tagged; input relayed; honest error frames; transfer-staleness guard. 7 new unit tests (fake connector) + a real two-WSManager round-trip e2e over real sockets.
